sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58951" key="kopa/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοπάριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a sort of <sense id="n58951.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">probe</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sever.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:92" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.92</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:81" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.81</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:62" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.62</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
